subject: Notice of Update to Hulu's Terms and Privacy Policy
body:
Hulu
http://click.hulumail.com/?qs=f010f3015a755fe22c672f94284b7ee48a3f7a58041e9c4625f8bc09ce2159d8f46027e09d5784094f338e2eff08a84c2fdfd3bb86f81685 
 

Hi, Jeffrey.

We hope you're enjoying your Spring!


Here at Hulu, we are continually focused on improving our services and the viewer experience. We were very excited to recently launch an all new Hulu experience and to give users the option to subscribe to our Hulu with Live TV (Beta) Plan.

To address some of the changes in our services, we've updated our Terms of Use  and Privacy Policy.  We want to ensure that we keep you informed about our practices, so we've summarized some of the key updates below. 

Terms of Use
http://click.hulumail.com/?qs=f010f3015a755fe20378c4970c91045d5e7d7a51aa1760d3f0c82953abb91c5e89857ac2016c4bc2d886713536bdc28be84479875d69a8f6 

Privacy Policy
http://click.hulumail.com/?qs=f010f3015a755fe2c486a6f46312cd832c6f09b4e80a6bc1d092cba3a4aedd44fbe64174aee961dcb3bbb25da90a298404b7e81d415a3075 

This summary is not exhaustive, so we encourage you to review the full, updated versions of our Terms of Use at http://click.hulumail.com/?qs=f010f3015a755fe20378c4970c91045d5e7d7a51aa1760d3f0c82953abb91c5e89857ac2016c4bc2d886713536bdc28be84479875d69a8f6 and Privacy Policy at http://click.hulumail.com/?qs=f010f3015a755fe2b1ceb6db770b62cde048a126b99f42910a8556262d3cab0b86bb2dbb021e11e68fdddc40d776ef85770ce25da63a05fe 

------------------------------

Terms of Use Updates

------------------------------

- We describe the option to personalize use of our services by creating profiles.

- We explain the various factors that may impact the quality of videos you watch through our services.

- We share important details about our live TV service, including information about commercials, live and on demand channel offerings, content availability, location services, and your personal cloud DVR.

- We describe some differences between our on demand only and live TV services, including the devices on which each is available and the number of streams on which you can watch videos at the same time.

- We offer some friendly reminders about data usage and internet connection requirements while you use our services.

- We remind you about our arbitration provision, and provide clarifications relating to the types of issues that are covered and payment of arbitration filing fees. 

------------------------------

Privacy Policy Updates

------------------------------

- We explain that subscribers to our live TV service will be asked to share location data in order to access the service on mobile devices.  

- We explain that we may ask for your consent to share what you watch together with your personal information and explain how you can opt out of this sharing.

- We provide information on how California residents under the age of 18 can request and obtain removal of content they have publicly posted on the services.

- We remind you that account information will be accessible to others who you choose to permit to access your account, including users who set up profiles under your account.


Thank you for being a part of the Hulu community. If you have any questions, or would like to contact us, please feel free to visit our Help Center at 
http://click.hulumail.com/?qs=f010f3015a755fe24fb43656dd65821c4e821b4492dd26d35ad1b600419f494ffb7ee850e9edae6b47c233e184be61c0ed03fd404d3fd615

Sincerely,
The Hulu Team

Blog:

body_html:
We want to keep you informed about our practices.
Hi, Jeffrey.
We hope you're enjoying your Spring!
Here at Hulu, we are continually focused on improving our services and the viewer experience. We were very excited to recently launch an all-new Hulu experience and to give users the option to subscribe to our Hulu with Live TV (Beta) Plan.

To address some of the changes in our services, we've updated our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.  We want to ensure that we keep you informed about our practices, so we've summarized some of the key updates below. 

This summary is not exhaustive, so we encourage you to review the full, updated versions of our Terms of Use at http://www.hulu.com/terms and Privacy Policy at http://www.hulu.com/privacy. 
Terms of Use Updates
●
We describe the option to personalize use of our services by creating profiles.
●
We explain the various factors that may impact the quality of videos you watch through our services.
●
We share important details about our live TV service, including information about commercials, live and on demand channel offerings, content availability, location services, and your personal cloud DVR.
●
We describe some differences between our on demand only and live TV services, including the devices on which each is available and the number of streams on which you can watch videos at the same time.
●
We offer some friendly reminders about data usage and internet connection requirements while you use our services.
●
We remind you about our arbitration provision, and provide clarifications relating to the types of issues that are covered and payment of arbitration filing fees.
Privacy Policy Updates
●
We explain that subscribers to our live TV service will be asked to share location data in order to access the service on mobile devices.  
●
We explain that we may ask for your consent to share what you watch together with your personal information and explain how you can opt out of this sharing.
●
We provide information on how California residents under the age of 18 can request and obtain removal of content they have publicly posted on the services.
●
We remind you that account information will be accessible to others who you choose to permit to access your account, including users who set up profiles under your account.
Thank you for being a part of the Hulu
community. If you have any questions, or would
like to contact us, please feel free to visit our Help
Center at help.hulu.com.

Sincerely,
The Hulu Team

subject: Notice of Update to Hulu's Terms and Privacy Policy
body:
http://click.hulumail.com/?qs=38e37eb2c2d826e8b97b558331489339e4aefbcc7f1c0b568821a4ebeb2dbebcaeb483652be14b01 

  
Hi Jeffrey,
  

We hope you're enjoying your summer. Here at Hulu, we are continually focused on improving our services and the viewer experience. To address some of the changes in our services, we've updated our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. We want to ensure that we keep you informed about our practices, so we've summarized some of the key updates below. This summary is not exhaustive, so we encourage you to review the full, updated versions of our Terms of Use at 
http://click.hulumail.com/?qs=38e37eb2c2d826e88ed7d0fe190dfc224dc3534a28541f1db2ca4dde56ef2eb7711edbc4db4d5fc1 
http://click.hulumail.com/?qs=38e37eb2c2d826e88ed7d0fe190dfc224dc3534a28541f1db2ca4dde56ef2eb7711edbc4db4d5fc1  and Privacy Policy at 
http://click.hulumail.com/?qs=38e37eb2c2d826e88ad7702c95b2ae2e94ca15f7947309a4a3ee0537ea5cad328020b7f5e8eb2f62 
http://click.hulumail.com/?qs=38e37eb2c2d826e838ab96514e031a534b1ae01fc75af88403394b8e0f9d85ce6b500509174feaea 
  
Terms of Use updates
	- Given our constant desire to innovate our service, we clarify that we may experiment with certain features and that the content and services may change from time to time.
	- We provide additional details about our billing practices, including in connection with promotional offers.
	- We include updated instructions around cancellation and explain that if you sign up and pay for Hulu through a third party (e.g., Apple iTunes) you may need to cancel your subscription or manage your billing through such third party.
	- We remind you that your interactions with third-party advertisements on our services, including any information you may provide through interactive advertisements, are between you and the advertiser. We encourage you to review any such advertiser's terms of use and privacy policy.
	- We clarify that we may communicate with you electronically and encourage you to keep copies of our electronic communications for your records.
Privacy Policy updates
	- We include an updated list of the types of technologies we or third parties may use to collect data from or about you. This data helps improve the content and advertisements provided to you.
	- We've likewise updated the section describing how we share information with business partners, service providers and other third parties.
	- We describe that you can choose to share information through sharing features we may offer, for example, through email, text message or social networks.
	- We provide instructions on how California residents can obtain more information about our data sharing practices in the event we were to share personal data about our users with third parties for their direct marketing purposes.
	- You have choices with respect to your use of our services and we include an updated and consolidated list of the various options available to you in a new section called "Your Choices, Including Opt-Out Options" (Section 6) which includes instructions about your opt-out choices related to your use of Hulu on websites, mobile devices and living room devices.
	- We explain that we may work with third parties who help us to establish connections across your related browsers and devices and how your opt-out choices apply.
  
Thank you for being a part of the Hulu community. If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out to us at 
mailto:legal@hulu.com 
legal@hulu.com. 
  
Sincerely,
 The Hulu Team

body_html:
Hi Jeffrey,
 
We hope you're enjoying your summer. Here at Hulu, we are continually focused on improving our services and the viewer experience. To address some of the changes in our services, we've updated our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. We want to ensure that we keep you informed about our practices, so we've summarized some of the key updates below. This summary is not exhaustive, so we encourage you to review the full, updated versions of our Terms of Use at http://www.hulu.com/terms and Privacy Policy at http://www.hulu.com/privacy.
 
Terms of Use updates
  • Given our constant desire to innovate our service, we clarify that we may experiment with certain features and that the content and services may change from time to time.
  • We provide additional details about our billing practices, including in connection with promotional offers.
  • We include updated instructions around cancellation and explain that if you sign up and pay for Hulu through a third party (e.g., Apple iTunes) you may need to cancel your subscription or manage your billing through such third party.
  • We remind you that your interactions with third-party advertisements on our services, including any information you may provide through interactive advertisements, are between you and the advertiser. We encourage you to review any such advertiser's terms of use and privacy policy.
  • We clarify that we may communicate with you electronically and encourage you to keep copies of our electronic communications for your records.
Privacy Policy updates
  • We include an updated list of the types of technologies we or third parties may use to collect data from or about you. This data helps improve the content and advertisements provided to you.
  • We've likewise updated the section describing how we share information with business partners, service providers and other third parties.
  • We describe that you can choose to share information through sharing features we may offer, for example, through email, text message or social networks.
  • We provide instructions on how California residents can obtain more information about our data sharing practices in the event we were to share personal data about our users with third parties for their direct marketing purposes.
  • You have choices with respect to your use of our services and we include an updated and consolidated list of the various options available to you in a new section called "Your Choices, Including Opt-Out Options" (Section 6) which includes instructions about your opt-out choices related to your use of Hulu on websites, mobile devices and living room devices.
  • We explain that we may work with third parties who help us to establish connections across your related browsers and devices and how your opt-out choices apply.
 
Thank you for being a part of the Hulu community. If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out to us at legal@hulu.com.
 
Sincerely,
The Hulu Team
 
 
       
 
 
Hulu, LLC. 2500 Broadway, 2nd Floor, Santa Monica, CA 90404
